recommendations.title: Gangs of Wasseypur - Part 1
recommendations.overview: In 1970s India, Sardar Khan vows to take revenge on the man who killed his father decades earlier.

recommendations.title: Ugly
recommendations.overview: When a 10-year old girl goes missing, her stepfather races against time to investigate the kidnapping. Can he find her before it's too late?

recommendations.title: Gangs of Wasseypur - Part 2
recommendations.overview: After the death of his father and brother Danish, Faizal Khan vows to take revenge by destroying Ramadhir Singh's gang.

recommendations.title: Dev.D
recommendations.overview: The son of a wealthy businessman finds solace in drugs and alcohol when he breaks up with his childhood love.

recommendations.title: Lust Stories
recommendations.overview: An anthology of four stories that sheds light on modern relationships from the viewpoint of the Indian woman.
recommendations.director: Karan Johar, Zoya Akhtar, Anurag Kashyap, Dibakar Banerjee

recommendations.title: Ratsasan
recommendations.overview: A serial killer is murdering school girls, and a newbie cop has to track him down before the victim count increases.

recommendations.title: Manhunter
recommendations.overview: FBI Agent Will Graham, who retired after catching Hannibal Lecktor, returns to duty to engage in a risky cat-and-mouse game with Lecktor to capture a new killer.

recommendations.title: The Last Client
recommendations.overview: Renowned psychologist Susanne (Signe Egholm Olsen) is caught in a living nightmare when her new client (Anton Hjejle) turns out to be a wanted serial killer.

recommendations.title: The Silencing
recommendations.overview: A reformed hunter becomes involved in a deadly game of cat and mouse when he and the local sheriff set out to track a vicious killer who may have kidnapped his daughter years ago.

recommendations.title: Mardaani
recommendations.overview: A Mumbai police officer's search for a missing teenage girl leads her to the depraved world of child trafficking. What follows is a cat-and-mouse game between the officer and a ruthless mafia kingpin.
